summary: Tested customer portal order feature: POST/GET /api/customer/orders, add to cart flow, order submission, order detail modal, product grid responsiveness. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: All flows working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/customer/orders correctly creates orders with source: customer_portal
GET /api/customer/orders returns orders linked to customer's phone number
Order detail modal shows only product details (name, code, qty) - NO prices or totals as required
Product grid uses correct Tailwind classes: grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4
Cart state properly managed via localStorage and React Context
Empty cart submission correctly rejected with 400 status
seed_data_creation: Created multiple test orders during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customer portal order feature fully tested. Orders are stored with source: customer_portal and appear in admin orders page. Cart is stored in localStorage under 'customerCart' key. Order detail modal shows only product name, code, and quantity - no prices or totals.

backend_apis.POST /api/customer/orders: PASS - Creates order from cart with proper validation
backend_apis.GET /api/customer/items: PASS - Returns available products for customer

customer_portal_flows.products_page: PASS - Shows products with grid layout
customer_portal_flows.add_to_cart: PASS - Quantity input + Add button works
customer_portal_flows.cart_tab: PASS - Shows cart items with quantity, NO prices
customer_portal_flows.place_order: PASS - Creates order and shows success toast
customer_portal_flows.active_orders_tab: PASS - Shows pending orders after placement
customer_portal_flows.order_detail_modal: PASS - Shows product name, code, qty only - NO prices or totals

admin_panel.source_tracking: PASS - Orders have source: customer_portal in database
